first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. The scores are the same, and the core reasoning in the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is consistent. The candidate is seen as strong in full-stack and infrastructure but lacking explicit high-level GenAI experience in both versions. The minor differences in wording and the highlighting of an additional strength (open-source work) in the variant fall well within the range of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any bias related to the change in location from Berlin to São Paulo.
